name: studio.update_theme_tokens
description: Update theme design tokens on an Actium Studio site: colors, typography, spacing, radius. Site-wide visual refresh without editing individual pages.
whenToUse: Rebrand flow: apply a new primary color + font family across the entire site in one call.
Post-scaffold refinement: adjust the design tokens auto-generated by studio.scaffold_site to match a brand guide.
Dark-mode / seasonal refresh: swap background + accent tokens for a limited campaign.
whenNotToUse: Caller wants to change one page's look — theme tokens are site-wide; use studio.update_page with inline styles for a single page.
Color strings are not valid hex / CSS color syntax — pre-validate; the server rejects malformed values with 400.
Caller wants to read current tokens before editing — call studio.get_theme first; this skill is write-only.
